lastRunSummary: Built Game 36: Rodeo Queen - skill-chain combo, 3 events (barrel timing, lasso circular-drag, trick riding hold/release), shared crowd energy, 5x multiplier, 37 tests pass.

currentTask.context: Director session starting - reading feedback and deciding next action

gameQueue.title: Tumbledown Town
gameQueue.concept: Physics demolition puzzle: a corrupt sheriff's crooked saloon is propped up by rickety supports. Tap to knock out supports one at a time, guiding the collapse to crush the wanted targets below while sparing the innocents. First physics-based demolition puzzle in the series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First Verlet/impulse physics structure simulation in series, first demolition puzzle mechanic, first game where the goal is controlled collapse rather than survival or construction

gameQueue.title: Dust Road Derby
gameQueue.concept: First racing game in the series: top-down oval circuit, 3 AI rivals with rubber-band difficulty scaling, slipstream mechanic (draft behind leading car for speed boost), dust cloud visibility penalty when off-line. 5 laps, position-based scoring. First racing/driving mechanic in the series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First real-time racing AI in series, first positional-scoring loop structure (not survival or accumulation), first slipstream/draft mechanic

gameQueue.title: Last Rope Standing
gameQueue.concept: Grappling hook survival: the last outlaw standing swings between fence posts on a rope lasso as floodwaters rise. Tap to latch onto the nearest post, pendulum-swing to gain height, release to fly to the next anchor point. Miss an anchor and you drop. First grapple-physics mechanic in the series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First pendulum-swing grapple physics in series, first vertical survival structure with rising threat, first game where spatial awareness and swing momentum are the primary skills
